data.title: Update dso-setup.sh completion echo to reference root INSTALL.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Implementation Steps
1. In `plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh`, find line 491 (approximately):
   `echo '3. See docs/INSTALL.md for full documentation'`
   Change to:
   `echo '3. See INSTALL.md for full documentation'`
2. In `.test-index`, remove the RED marker entry added by the RED test task:
   Remove: `plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh: tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh [test_setup_references_root_install_doc]`
   (The fuzzy match dsosetupsh ⊂ testdsosetupsh already handles the file association without an explicit entry)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `grep -n 'docs/INSTALL\.md' plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh` returns exit 1 (old path removed)
  Verify: ! grep -q 'docs/INSTALL\.md' plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh
- [ ] `grep -q 'See INSTALL\.md for full documentation' plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh` exits 0 (new path present)
  Verify: grep -q 'See INSTALL\.md for full documentation' plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh
- [ ] `test_setup_references_root_install_doc` now PASSES in test-dso-setup.sh (GREEN state)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'PASS.*test_setup_references_root_install_doc'
- [ ] RED marker `[test_setup_references_root_install_doc]` removed from `.test-index`
  Verify: ! grep '\[test_setup_references_root_install_doc\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
